tasks.description: In calc.py, the add(a, b) function returns a - b instead of a + b. Fix it so the tests pass.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_001/calc.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_001-2062219-acd66153bc2e4b5ab8eb86081f4d1393/calc.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_001/calc.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573541250 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_001-2062219-acd66153bc2e4b5ab8eb86081f4d1393/calc.py	2026-06-15 12:38:46.099327571 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def add(a, b):
-    return a - b
+    return a + b

tasks.description: In seq.py, last(xs) raises IndexError because it uses xs[len(xs)] (off by one). Fix it to return the last element.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_002/seq.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_002-2062219-12c25eac63fe4f29a9007715afa800f7/seq.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_002/seq.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573746791 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_002-2062219-12c25eac63fe4f29a9007715afa800f7/seq.py	2026-06-15 12:39:04.650653998 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def last(xs):
-    return xs[len(xs)]
+    return xs[-1]

tasks.description: In mathx.py, double(x) computes x * 2 but never returns it (returns None). Add the missing return.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_003/mathx.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_003-2062219-b3da96de33db4801988d4bf616fda5b0/mathx.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_003/mathx.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573872048 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_003-2062219-b3da96de33db4801988d4bf616fda5b0/mathx.py	2026-06-15 12:41:20.164110223 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def double(x):
-    x * 2
+    return x * 2

tasks.description: In counts.py, get_count(d, k) raises KeyError when k is absent. Make it return 0 for missing keys.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_004/counts.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_004-2062219-9f11a2e3b5b94f4d987ca1d99e468b36/counts.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_004/counts.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573999933 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_004-2062219-9f11a2e3b5b94f4d987ca1d99e468b36/counts.py	2026-06-15 12:41:45.191576142 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
 def get_count(d, k):
+    return d.get(k, 0)
     return d[k]

tasks.description: In strutil.py, reverse(s) returns the string unchanged. Make it return the reversed string.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_005/strutil.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_005-2062219-1f1f1958879c4b07b53e7250fe7ff195/strutil.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_005/strutil.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574125337 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_005-2062219-1f1f1958879c4b07b53e7250fe7ff195/strutil.py	2026-06-15 12:42:03.597920970 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def reverse(s):
-    return s
+    return s[::-1]

tasks.description: In nums.py, evens(xs) keeps ODD numbers (x % 2 == 1). Fix it to keep even numbers.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_006/nums.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_006-2062219-adce1dfcec8945509c68ef14d01b973b/nums.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_006/nums.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574248297 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_006-2062219-adce1dfcec8945509c68ef14d01b973b/nums.py	2026-06-15 12:46:20.308889086 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def evens(xs):
-    return [x for x in xs if x % 2 == 1]
+    return [x for x in xs if x % 2 == 0]

tasks.description: In fact.py, factorial(0) recurses forever because the base case is `n == 1`. Fix the base case so factorial(0) == 1.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_007/fact.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_007-2062219-87581bd7fe924019876a99d0aeec698c/fact.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_007/fact.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574410453 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_007-2062219-87581bd7fe924019876a99d0aeec698c/fact.py	2026-06-15 12:46:39.788276059 -0400
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 def factorial(n):
-    if n == 1:
+    if n == 0:
         return 1
     return n * factorial(n - 1)

tasks.description: In valid.py, in_range(x, lo, hi) uses OR so it's always true. Fix it to require x within [lo, hi].
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_008/valid.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_008-2062219-124e1cb29d374678bf5f1fb1fb036449/valid.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_008/valid.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574538384 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_008-2062219-124e1cb29d374678bf5f1fb1fb036449/valid.py	2026-06-15 12:46:58.321645311 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def in_range(x, lo, hi):
-    return x >= lo or x <= hi
+    return x >= lo and x <= hi

tasks.description: In helper.py, slugify replaces spaces with '' instead of '-', so make_slug in api.py is wrong. Fix slugify.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_009/helper.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_009-2062219-cb5231dbd6f24014b1c6b6f28a67f25f/helper.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_009/helper.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574662768 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_009-2062219-cb5231dbd6f24014b1c6b6f28a67f25f/helper.py	2026-06-15 12:49:26.588632719 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def slugify(s):
-    return s.replace(" ", "")
+    return s.replace(" ", "-")

tasks.description: In acc.py, Accumulator.add overwrites total (self.total = x) instead of accumulating. Fix it to add.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_010/acc.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_010-2062219-5b6782f44edc40abbff0688ca5a64063/acc.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_010/acc.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574662768 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_010-2062219-5b6782f44edc40abbff0688ca5a64063/acc.py	2026-06-15 12:49:56.908250055 -0400
@@ -2,5 +2,5 @@
     def __init__(self):
         self.total = 0
     def add(self, x):
-        self.total = x
+        self.total += x
         return self.total

tasks.description: In math_utils.py, square(x) returns x + x instead of x * x, so sum_of_squares in stats.py is wrong. Fix square.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_011/math_utils.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_011-2062219-d50e2eac43934c40b15d83f034760f36/math_utils.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_011/math_utils.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574961395 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_011-2062219-d50e2eac43934c40b15d83f034760f36/math_utils.py	2026-06-15 12:50:15.920638141 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def square(x):
-    return x + x
+    return x * x

tasks.description: In running.py, running_max initializes m = 0, so it returns 0 for all-negative inputs. Fix the initialization to handle negatives.
In avg.py, average(xs) raises ZeroDivisionError on an empty list. Make it return 0 for empty input.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_013/avg.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_013-2062219-6513bcebeccf4e728acf883282a259ad/avg.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_013/avg.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.575136381 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_013-2062219-6513bcebeccf4e728acf883282a259ad/avg.py	2026-06-15 12:51:00.146543637 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,4 @@
 def average(xs):
+    if not xs:
+        return 0
     return sum(xs) / len(xs)

tasks.description: In ops.py, one of the four functions is wrong: mul(a, b) returns a + b instead of a * b. Fix it.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_014/ops.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_014-2062219-78f8fd77729947fbb1139206f540fbbb/ops.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_014/ops.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.575453999 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_014-2062219-78f8fd77729947fbb1139206f540fbbb/ops.py	2026-06-15 12:51:29.835153516 -0400
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
     return a - b
 
 def mul(a, b):
-    return a + b
+    return a * b
 
 def div(a, b):
     return a / b
